amended_provisions: Unit 5 is subdivided into Unit 5A and Unit 5B as shown on the amended Plats and Plans, and the allocated interests of Unit 5 are divided between the new Units as set forth in the amended Moe K. Coe

consent_basis.author: Reviewing Attorney
consent_basis.basis: subdivision of a unit on its owner's application, 33 M.R.S. § 1602-113 — increases the number of units but is expressly permitted by the Act
